name: Maverick Storm 3 Profile

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C9F2EB69-8EC6-45D7-96B1-A100408D71A6

comment: With an 18:1 zoom and a full armory of features, Maverick Storm 3 Profile is a compact IP65 moving profile with incredible reach. This lightweight powerhouse combines the latest Maverick series technical achievements with the durability and versatility to perform indoors and out. Harness over 30,000 lumens of output as you go from a narrow 3.4° beam to a wide 56.7° spot. Freely create with its exquisitely sharp framing shutter system and a wheelhouse that includes variable CMY + CTO color mixing, color wheel with CRI and CTB filters, static and rotating gobo wheels, five-facet prism, iris, and frost. This Maverick weathers the storm and welcomes the sunshine with Sun Shield technology that comes on with complete protection of all internal optical components whenever the fixture powers down

capabilities.comment: Slow Open Fast Close  S > F
Slow Close Fast Open  S > F

gwSpecs.description: With an 18:1 zoom and a full armory of features, Maverick Storm 3 Profile is a compact IP65 moving profile with incredible reach. This lightweight powerhouse combines the latest Maverick series technical achievements with the durability and versatility to perform indoors and out. Harness over 30,000 lumens of output as you go from a narrow 3.4° beam to a wide 56.7° spot. Freely create with its exquisitely sharp framing shutter system and a wheelhouse that includes variable CMY + CTO color mixing, color wheel with CRI and CTB filters, static and rotating gobo wheels, five-facet prism, iris, and frost. This Maverick weathers the storm and welcomes the sunshine with Sun Shield technology that comes on with complete protection of all internal optical components whenever the fixture powers down
